title: FD pipeline SDK mode — retry model escalation tiers
summary: This delivery adds declarative SDK model escalation tiers for feature-delivery retries. Operators configure pancreator-model-escalation.yaml at the repository root; active config resolves from PAN_MODEL_ESCALATION_CONFIG, then runner.cursor.model_escalation.config in pancreator.yaml, then the file-level active_config…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human accepts this index artifact, run pan advance to complete, then delegate the generated complete-stage prompt for…
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
